title: Date calculation and comparison produce wrong result
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE bar (id INT PRIMARY KEY, start_date DATE, end_date DATE, duration INT CHECK (duration >= 0));
INSERT INTO bar (id, start_date, end_date, duration) VALUES (1, '2023-01-01', '2023-01-10', DATEDIFF('2023-01-10', '2023-01-01'));
INSERT INTO bar (id, start_date, end_date, duration) VALUES (2, '2023-02-01', '2023-02-05', DATEDIFF('2023-02-05', '2023-02-01'));
SELECT id, duration, DATEDIFF(end_date, start_date) AS calculated_duration FROM bar WHERE duration <> DATEDIFF(end_date, start_date);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bar WHERE start_date IS NULL OR end_date IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Date calculation and comparison logic errors
